scope: self-pentest of own payment gateway pre-launch
excluded: Dynamic probing of live Lambda (not yet deployed — deferred to PR 8)
Third-party services (Wompi, Cognito, Verifik) external assessment

summary.go_no_go_rationale: 22 production-blockers + 5 regulatory compliance gaps. Cannot deploy to handle real money without addressing critical financial-loss and legal-exposure findings.

production_blockers.title: Webhook signature verifies HMAC but never validates timestamp — replay attacks possible
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: Attacker can replay valid Wompi webhook N times → credit/debit wallet N times. Direct financial loss.

production_blockers.title: DebitWalletUseCase TOCTOU between balance read and conditional write — overdraft + stale balance leak
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: TOCTOU race can result in overdraft. Stale balance leaked to client via error message.

production_blockers.title: PURCHASE_CASHBACK (2%) has no per-user daily cap — unlimited bonus farming via micro-transactions
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: Attacker can farm unlimited 2% cashback on micro-transactions. Direct financial loss at scale.

production_blockers.title: Delivery evidence photo_url accepted without SSRF validation — AWS IMDS exfiltration possible
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: Attacker submits http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/ as evidence photo. DPO clicks → AWS IAM creds exfiltrated. Full account takeover.

production_blockers.title: x-dev-user auth bypass fail-open when NODE_ENV is undefined (Lambda default)
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: If Lambda deployed without NODE_ENV=production, x-dev-user header bypasses ALL auth. Attacker fabricates any identity including DPO admin.

production_blockers.title: [DUPLICATE] Market-web dev auth bypass in cognito-sso-consumer.ts — same pattern as OPL-LIB-005
Wallet P2P transfer uses non-atomic debit+credit — funds can be permanently lost
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: If credit leg fails after debit, sender's funds vanish. Decreto 222/2020 closed-loop funds-loss = regulatory violation.

production_blockers.title: POST /v1/delivery/confirm has no authentication — anyone can release escrow
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: Signature verification commented out. Any internet attacker can release escrow for sub-$1M transactions without evidence.

production_blockers.title: Wallet withdraw race condition — concurrent requests can overdraw wallet
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: Check-then-act without conditional update. Two concurrent withdraws of full balance both pass the balance check.

production_blockers.title: PUBLIC_JWT_SECRET in .env.local — secret inlined into client bundle, forgeable sessions
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: Attacker extracts HS256 signing key from JS bundle → forge __opita_session cookies for any user.

production_blockers.title: Wompi widget script loaded without Subresource Integrity (SRI) — MITM card data exfiltration
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: MITM on checkout.wompi.co serves modified widget.js → exfiltrates card data. Full payment data at risk.

production_blockers.title: Lambda IAM role scope unverified — likely broad SST auto-generated policy granting Secrets Manager access
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: If Lambda is compromised, broad IAM allows reading ComplianceJwtSecret + VerifikApiKey. JWT forgery chain → account takeover.

production_blockers.title: Zero velocity controls — no per-BIN/IP/device/email counter. Card-testing undetected.
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: Attacker probes thousands of cards from one IP or rotates IPs. No detection. Direct gateway to carding losses.

production_blockers.title: Webhook handler is a stub — no state transition, no balance credit, no 3DS verification
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: Card payment flow is non-functional. Money cannot be credited. 3DS verification is bypassed. PCI-DSS SAQ-A expectation violated.

production_blockers.title: SIC closed-loop wallet registration not evidenced — Decreto 222/2020 Art. 3 violation
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: Operating a closed-loop wallet without SIC registration is a regulatory violation. Cannot legally process COP-denominated closed-loop transactions.

production_blockers.title: UIAF alert Lambda handler throws 'not implemented' — no AML alerts in production
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: UIAF requires suspicious transaction reports above 5M COP. Handler is stub. Cannot comply with anti-money-laundering obligations.

production_blockers.title: No PEP (Politically Exposed Persons) screening — UIAF enhanced due diligence gap
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: UIAF requires enhanced due diligence for PEPs. No screening exists. Regulatory non-compliance.

production_blockers.title: No sanctions screening against OFAC/UN/EU lists
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: Sanctions screening required for transactions above 1M COP. None exists. Could process payment to sanctioned individual = OFAC violation.

production_blockers.title: DEVICE_FINGERPRINT_MISMATCH signal defined but device fingerprint never collected
production_blockers.note: Marked MEDIUM (not CRITICAL) per agent assessment, but listed here as it's part of the fraud engine hardening for completeness.

production_blockers.title: Wompi production private key (prv_prod_*) stored in plaintext root .env
production_blockers.blocks_production_reason: prv_prod_5BW7fTritUEM64TqM0NwX2SgJWxo5Bkv is live production. Anyone with .env access (or Git history leak) can authorize Wompi payments at merchant expense. NOT in SST Secrets — needs immediate migration.

high_findings.title: InsufficientBalanceError leaks stale balance via error message
InvalidSignatureError messages reveal webhook schema structure
FIRST_PURCHASE_CASHBACK double-claim on concurrent purchases
No per-user referral cap — unlimited referral fraud
Payment intent allows from_user_id override (IDOR/mass assignment)
Webhook no idempotency — same event processed twice
Transfer accepts to_user_id from body — arbitrary victim credits
No rate limiting anywhere — Lambda DoS + enumeration
No CSRF protection on state-mutating API calls
No CSP / security headers in Astro middleware
JWT audience (aud) not validated — token for any service accepted
Withdrawal phone has no format validation
DPO_EMAIL hardcoded in client-bundled legal-secrets.generated.ts
MarketCheckoutModal — no Escape key, no focus trap
Wompi keys in plaintext .env (also OPL-SECRET-001 but architectural gap)
Cron roles not yet defined — overpermissioning risk
No reserved concurrency — account DoS possible
3DS status not verified in webhook — bypass possible
PURCHASE_CASHBACK no cooldown — unlimited cashback farming
Clock injection in bonus engine — contextTs parameter
Fraud SUM formula not normalized — high FPR
PTD missing DPO phone number
Tier 4 unlimited withdrawals — Decreto 222 limit gap
No Terms of Service page — Estatuto Consumidor violation
Wompi fees not disclosed before payment
No SAR filing to UIAF — only DPO alert
No structuring detection in UIAF monitor
No 10M COP threshold for non-cash transactions
Wompi fees hidden in checkout — SIC dark pattern

cve_findings.exploitable: Possibly — verify sourcemaps disabled in CI build
Yes — double URL-encode bypasses middleware auth
No — neither service uses Hono's static file serving

gaps: Tier 4 unlimited withdrawals may exceed Decreto Art. 4 limits (HIGH)
Refund policy not visible to consumer (LOW)
Aviso de Privacidad missing retention details (LOW)

items: Fix webhook signature timestamp validation (5 min)
Replace debit + credit with TransactWriteItems (4 hours)
Wire up webhook full state machine + 3DS verification (8 hours)
Implement HMAC signature for delivery webhook (4 hours)
Move Wompi keys to SST Secrets (2 hours)
Add nodeEnv !== 'production' AND DEV_AUTH_ENABLED check (15 min)
PUBLIC_JWT_SECRET → JWT_SECRET (no PUBLIC_) + Cloudflare runtime env (1 hour)
Wompi widget SRI + crossOrigin (1 hour)
Velocity controls in runFraudChecks (8 hours)
Per-user daily bonus cap (2 hours)
Photo URL SSRF validation in escrow (2 hours)
SIC registration for closed-loop wallet (regulatory — days/weeks)
UIAF cron wiring (8 hours)
PEP + sanctions screening (external service, $$$$)
JWT audience validation (15 min)
Race condition in withdraw → use DebitWalletUseCase (1 hour)
Clock injection removal in bonus engine (30 min)
First-purchase bonus atomic claim (2 hours)
Astro upgrade to 5.15.8+ (1 hour)
CloudWatch alarms (4 hours)
Reserved concurrency (1 hour)
CORS / security headers (1 hour)
High findings (IDOR, mass assignment, rate limiting, etc.)
Medium + Low findings, code quality, observability
All compliance gaps — requires legal counsel + SIC/UIAF registration

next_steps: 1. Operator review of this report (1 hour)
2. Schedule remediation sprint (5-7 business days for Phase 1)
3. Compliance legal review (parallel — can start now)
4. Re-pentest after Phase 1 fix (verify no regression)
5. Deploy to dev stage for dynamic probing (PR 8)
6. Production go/no-go decision after Phase 1 + 2 complete
